taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
core_skills: QA Engineering, Software Quality Assurance, Playwright, TypeScript, REST API Testing
skill_match_scores: QA Engineering:0.0, Software Quality Assurance:1.0, Playwright:0.0, TypeScript:1.0, REST API Testing:0.0
must_have_quals: 3–5 years of QA experience, with a strong track record in ensuring software quality and reliability, Proven experience delivering high-availability enterprise software products in a fast-paced SaaS environment, Proficiency in Playwright, TypeScript, and REST API testing, with a focus on automation and scalability, Experience with AWS and GraphQL is a plus, demonstrating familiarity with modern cloud and API technologies, Comfortable with continuous integration tools, distributed version control systems (e.g., GitHub), and virtualization technologies, supporting streamlined development workflows, Quick learner with a passion for adapting to new technologies and tools, eager to grow and expand technical expertise, Strong problem-solving skills and meticulous attention to detail, ensuring high-quality deliverables, Excellent written and verbal communication skills, able to clearly convey ideas and collaborate effectively, Team-oriented mindset, thriving in collaborative, cross-functional environments, Experience with automated testing tools and frameworks is a plus, enhancing efficiency and coverage
core_responsibilities: Develop and execute comprehensive test plans for new features using TypeScript and Playwright, building on existing QA frameworks, Document test cases and results clearly in the QA tracking system to ensure transparency and reproducibility, Collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams, communicating issues and findings clearly and proactively, Contribute to the development and continuous improvement of QA strategies to enhance overall product quality and efficiency, Lead and advocate for QA processes across development teams, ensuring adherence to best practices, Deploy and manage builds in QA environments, leveraging appropriate tools to support testing workflows, Analyze and evaluate automated testing framework results, identify issues, and drive actionable insights, Adapt smoothly to shifting priorities, maintaining focus and productivity under changing project requirements
job_summary: Tealium is a leader in real-time Customer Data Platforms, dedicated to helping organizations unify their customer data for personalized experiences. They are seeking a QA Engineer to uphold high standards of quality through testing methodologies, collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure software reliability and efficiency.
